{{CargoRelic
|name=Strange Device
|class_id=20358
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This strange-looking device combined both magic and science and can send anything to an unknown world. However, since the trip is one-way only, so far no one has been able to return to their homeworld afterward...
|fame=16
|art=19
|fth=16
|civ=13
|tech=26
|ss1=Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +3<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|ss2=Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +6<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|ss3=Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +9<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|ss4=Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +9<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|ss7=Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +9<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000<br> (Awakened)
}}
